message:
perf: disable debug logging by default to fix performance hang

The debug logging functions were unconditionally writing to log files
on every event, causing severe performance degradation as logs grew.

Changes:
- Logging disabled by default (zero overhead)
- Enable via TERMWEB_CDP_DEBUG=1 or TERMWEB_INPUT_DEBUG=1
- Fresh log on each startup (truncates existing)
- Auto-truncate at 10MB to prevent runaway growth
- File handle kept open (no repeated open/close)
